subject.title: Mathematics Analysis and Approaches (AA)
subject.description:
**IB Mathematics Analysis and Approaches** is a **Group 5** subject in the **International Baccalaureate Diploma Programme (IBDP)**. It explores **number and algebra, functions, geometry and trigonometry, statistics and probability, and calculus**, with a strong focus on **theoretical understanding, formal mathematical reasoning, and analytical problem-solving**.

The course is available at **Standard Level (SL, 150 teaching hours)** and **Higher Level (HL, 240 teaching hours)**, with **first assessment in 2021**.

### Assessment at a Glance

| Assessment | Format | SL | HL | Weighting |
|------------|--------|----|----|-----------|
| **Paper 1** | Non-calculator written exam | 90 minutes | 120 minutes | 40% |
| **Paper 2** | Calculator allowed written exam | 90 minutes | 120 minutes | 40% |
| **Paper 3** | Calculator allowed problem-solving | N/A | 60 minutes | 20% (HL only) |
| **Mathematical Exploration** | Internal Assessment | 20 hours | 20 hours | 20% |

strengths: Clear and logical structure with identifiable introduction, methodology, results, discussion and conclusion
Effective use of headings, table of contents and boxed formulae to guide the reader
Focused title and clear section labels that support the central line of reasoning
weaknesses: Frequent mis-numbering of sections and subsections hinders smooth navigation
Repetition of aims and lengthy personal history reduce conciseness
Formatting glitches (missing figure/table labels, cut-off sentences) interrupt professional presentation
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The exploration demonstrates good coherence and logical development (band 3) and is well organized with clear structure, but occasional numbering errors and digressions prevent it from reaching the highest band. Conciseness is mostly achieved, though some redundancy remains. A score of 3/4 reflects strong overall presentation with room for refinement.

strengths: Use of standard statistical symbols (Î¼, s) and probability notation for calculations
Tables, a box-and-whisker plot and bar chart provide multiple views of the data
Logical progression from definition to calculation to interpretation in most explanations
weaknesses: Inconsistent notation (e.g. âmodeâ used instead of mean, units inside formulae)
Limited variety of representationsâno histograms or cumulative plots
Imprecise statements and missing justifications for choice of formulae limit clarity
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The mathematical communication shows some appropriate language and notation, basic multiple representations and an underlying logical structure (band 2). However, notation errors and limited graphical analysis constrain clarity and effectiveness, yielding a 2/4.

strengths: A clear personal motivation rooted in tennis experience drives the investigation
Creation of bespoke speed intervals and gathering primary match data shows initiative
Personal reflections on how findings influence serve strategy demonstrate genuine engagement
weaknesses: Mathematical approach mirrors standard classroom exercises without innovative extensions
No advanced modelling or exploration of alternative analytical routes
Independent thinking is present but not outstanding
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The work exhibits significant evidence of independent thinking, a clear personal approach and good creativity (band 2). It falls short of top-band innovation and depth, warranting a 2/3 for personal engagement.

strengths: Meaningful reflections on how findings confirm or contradict the hypothesis
Identification of limitations and suggestions for future research directions
Connection of results to real-life serving strategy shows thoughtful consideration
weaknesses: Analysis remains largely descriptive with minimal depth or insight into underlying causes
Evaluation of outcomes lacks quantitative assessment of bias or reliability
Conclusions often restate earlier findings without new synthesis
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: While the exploration contains meaningful reflection on results (band 2 for depth), critical analysis and evaluation of outcomes are basic and limited (band 1). The overall performance aligns with limited reflection and evaluation descriptors, meriting 1/3.

strengths: Relevant descriptive statistics and probabilities directly address the research question
Correct use of unbiased standard deviation formula and complete enumeration method
Clear formulation of serve distribution enhances the mathematical model
weaknesses: Techniques are limited to elementary statistics with no inferential testing
Calculation errors and mislabelled results indicate partial inaccuracies
Application remains within standard syllabus level without advanced modelling
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The student applies relevant mathematics appropriately and shows thorough understanding of formulae (characteristic of band 3). Despite some slips and lack of higher-order techniques, the depth and correctness of key calculations justify a 3/6.

strandSelections.reasoning: Explanations generally follow a logical order (definition â calculation â interpretation).  Nevertheless, imprecise statements (e.g., âas we can see from the modeâ¦â) and missing justifications for formula choices limit clarity.  This places the work in the middle band for logical structure.

Calculations give plausible numerical answers, but several slips (wrongly labelling a mean as a mode, treating different sample sizes inconsistently) reveal partial misunderstanding.  Overall understanding is present but with non-trivial errors, matching band 2.

The student employs tables, one box-and-whisker plot and a bar chart; these give some alternative views of the data yet remain basic.  No further graphical analysis (e.g., scatter plots, cumulative frequencies) is offered, so the work demonstrates âsomeâ but not âeffectiveâ multiple representation.

The exploration follows a recognisable pathâintroduction, methodology, results, discussion and conclusionâwhich allows the reader to follow the argument without major difficulty.  Although occasional digressions, repetition of aims and some mis-numbered sections interrupt the flow, the central line of reasoning (collect data â compute statistics â interpret) is generally maintained from start to finish.  Hence the work is judged coherent and logically developed rather than merely âsomewhatâ coherent or âexcellentâ.

Designing the four bespoke speed intervals and gathering primary data show creativity and initiative beyond a minimal level.  Still, the mathematical techniques remain basic and no advanced modelling or alternative analytical routes are attempted; therefore the strand falls short of the top band.

Analysis is mainly descriptiveâe.g., âhigher serves have higher probabilityââwith little depth in examining why standard deviation differences might arise or testing statistical significance.  Consequently the critical analysis is basic rather than thoughtful.

While the student notes limitations (single match, mixed first/second serves) and suggests improvements, there is minimal quantitative evaluation of how these factors altered outcomes or of the reliability of the numerical results.  This corresponds to a limited evaluation of outcomes.

The student reflects on how results confirm or contradict the initial hypothesis and comments on limitations such as inclusion of second serves.  These reflections are integrated throughout the discussion and conclusion, satisfying the descriptor of âmeaningful reflectionâ.

Standard statistical symbols (\(\mu,\,s\)) and probability notation are used, but there are slips such as calling the mean the âmodeâ and placing units inside the formulae.  Notation is therefore partially correct rather than largely consistent.

A clear personal motivation (past competitive tennis experience) underpins the investigation, and reflections on how findings will influence her serve strategy indicate a personal approach.  Yet the methodology itself mirrors common statistical assignments; hence engagement is clear but not highly innovative.

Most material is relevant to the stated aim, but the student repeats explanations of mean/median, includes lengthy personal tennis history and re-states conclusions multiple times.  These extraneous passages reduce conciseness, yet the work does avoid large blocks of wholly irrelevant content, so a mid-level band is appropriate.

Means, medians, standard deviations and simple conditional probabilities are all relevant to the research question, but they represent only elementary statistics.  No inferential tests or more sophisticated modelling are attempted, so application remains limited.

Selecting and recording an entire Grand-Slam final rather than using a canned dataset shows a reasonable level of initiative and independence.  The student devises her own categorisation of speed ranges and interprets results personally.  However, she largely applies textbook statistics without developing novel mathematical ideas, so evidence of independent thinking is significant but not âoutstandingâ.

Clear headings, a table of contents, and section numbering give the report an evident structure.  Data tables, boxed formulae and appendix placement also support navigation.  However, formatting glitches (e.g. duplicate labels, missing figure numbering) and occasional disorder in the results section prevent the submission from reaching the âexceptionally well organisedâ standard.

All techniques used (basic descriptive statistics and classical probability) are within the SL syllabus, yet they do not extend beyond it.  Thus the mathematics is mostly at the course level rather than fully commensurate or advanced.

annotations.comment: The title provides a clear and focused research question, guiding the reader effectively into the exploration.
The table of contents omits section 3.4 and misnumbers subsection labels, hindering navigation and cohesion. Revise numbering for clarity.
The introduction repeats the aim multiple times in one paragraph. Consolidate these statements to improve conciseness and avoid redundancy.
The personal background paragraph effectively connects the investigation to your tennis experience, demonstrating genuine personal engagement.
The methodology section describes complete enumeration clearly, indicating rigorous data collection without sampling bias.
A sentence in the limitations paragraph is cut off midâthought, reducing clarity. Complete the thought or restructure the paragraph.
Clarify the summation indices in the mean formula by using $$\mu=\frac{\sum_{i=1}^n x_i}{n}$$ for consistent mathematical notation.
The interpretation refers to the âmodeâ instead of the âmean.â Correct this mislabel to avoid conceptual misunderstanding.
Appropriate choice of the sample standard deviation formula ($$s=\sqrt{\frac{\sum(x_i-\mu)^2}{n-1}}$$) shows good understanding of unbiased estimation.
Interpretation focuses on consistency but lacks quantitative insight on how variance affects win probability; consider adding numeric comparison.
Accurate use of median formulas for odd and even sample sizes demonstrates correct application of different formulae.
Link the median comparison to distribution skew by referring back to the boxplot or a histogram, reinforcing the interpretation.
Enhance the caption by specifying which box belongs to each player and highlighting key quartile values.
The interpretation claims Player 2âs whiskers vary more, yet the chart shows the opposite; review the diagram and correct the analysis.
Notation $$\overline{S_{\min}}$$ appears for Player 2 instead of the defined $$\overline{S_{\text{win}}}$$; unify notation throughout.
When citing tables, use precise labels (e.g., âTable 4â) instead of generic references to avoid confusion in crossâreferencing.
Tables 1 and 2 effectively present counts by speed range, providing clear multiple representations for analysis.
The discussion remains descriptive; include analysis of how win probability changes per 10 km/h increment for deeper insight.
Section title contains a stray period: âWithin a. Speed Range.â Remove the extra character to improve professionalism.
The formula for serve distribution across ranges is clearly stated and enhances the mathematical modeling of player behavior.
Reflect on how the selected four speed bins affect probability estimates and consider sensitivity of results to different bin widths.
Labelling âTotal Probability of Winning a Pointâ clearly defines the sectionâs purpose and supports logical flow.
The real-life implications effectively connect findings to serve strategy, demonstrating thoughtful reflection.
Evaluation of methodology notes strengths but omits quantitative assessment of bias from including second serves; add impact estimate.
The suggestions for improvement clearly indicate future research directions and demonstrate critical reflection on methodology.
The conclusionâs personal reflection on Excel skill demonstrates strong engagement and effective linking of learning outcomes.
The conclusion restates earlier findings without new insights; refine to synthesize key results and implications more concisely.
Bibliography lists only two sources; incorporate additional academic references on statistical methods to strengthen theoretical underpinning.
Citation formatting is inconsistent; adopt a uniform style (e.g., APA or MLA) for online sources to improve presentation.
The connection back to the research question repeats prior conclusions; consider integrating succinctly or combining with other sections.
